description: I’m a Software Engineer by profession, but professionally overthinking ideas is probably my real full-time job. I love building software, solving problems, automating boring tasks, and asking, “Can this be done with AI?” more times than I’d like to admit. I enjoy learning new technologies, experimenting with side projects, and occasionally breaking things just to understand how they work (don’t worry… usually in a safe environment). My long-term goal is simple: one day, I want to become an entrepreneur. I’m fascinated by creating products that solve real problems, whether it’s a web app, an AI tool, or an idea that starts with “This might be crazy…” and somehow ends up working. When I’m not writing test cases or debugging code that was definitely working five minutes ago, you’ll probably find me exploring AI, building personal projects, cycling, cooking, or planning my next startup that will either change the world… or become another folder called Final_Project_v27_Really_Final. I believe learning never stops, technology keeps evolving, and every challenge is just another opportunity to build something better. If you’re passionate about software, AI, automation, or entrepreneurship, let’s connect. Worst case, we’ll exchange debugging stories. Best case, we might build something amazing together.
